title: 2x 10 Sachets Hot Chocolate With Mokate Salted Caramel (2x 180g) – Bundled by GetInStyle Shop
features: PREMIUM FLAVOR DUO -- Salted Caramel hot chocolate sachets deliver a rich, velvety chocolate base with an indulgent salted caramel twist, perfect for cozy moments or gifting.
CONVENIENT BUNDLE -- Includes 2 packs, each containing 10 individually wrapped sachets (total 20 sachets) and a combined net weight of 180 g, ideal for variety and quick preparation.
QUICK AND EASY -- Simply add hot water or milk, stir, and enjoy a smooth, café-quality drink in seconds—great for busy mornings or relaxing evenings.
VERSATILE SERVING -- Suitable for adults and chocolate lovers alike; pairs well with desserts or can be enjoyed as a standalone treat.
Package contents:2x 10 Sachets Hot Chocolate With Mokate Salted Caramel (2x 180g). Total 360 g. The actual packaging may vary.
description: Product description Salted Caramel hot chocolate delivers a rich, creamy chocolate base infused with a premium salted caramel twist for a layered, café-worthy beverage experience. Each bundle includes 2 packs, with 10 individually wrapped sachets per pack (total 20 sachets) and a combined net weight of 180 g, offering both value and convenience for households or gifting. Quick and simple to prepare: add hot water or hot milk, stir until smooth, and enjoy a velvety drink in seconds—perfect for busy mornings, evenings, or relaxing breaks. Portable and shelf-stable packaging keeps each sachet fresh, making it easy to stock a pantry, office drawer, or classroom, and suitable for sharing with friends and family. A versatile treat that pairs well with desserts or enjoyed solo; suitable for adults and chocolate lovers seeking a cozy, premium hot chocolate moment. Ingredients Sugar, fat-reduced drinking chocolate (30 %) [sugar, fat-reduced cocoa powder*], modified starch, glucose syrup, vegetable oils (coconut, palm in varying proportions), salt, flavourings, whole.MILK powder, caramelised sugar, stabilisers: sodium citrates, potassium phosphates; thickener: cellulose gum, milk proteins.
